patterns.message: Avoid direct performance comparison claims like 'X faster/slower than Y' against competitors
Avoid war metaphors like 'crushing', 'battlefield', or 'massive win' in documentation
patterns.pattern: /\b(battle|crushing it|crushing|battlefield|huge win|massive win|dominating|dominate|destroying|destroy|killer|crush it|crush|annihilate|obliterate|combat|weaponize|arsenal|at war|fight(?:ing)? against|go to war|bulletproof)\b/gi

patterns.message: Avoid condescending or exclusionary language (can alienate readers)
